title: Daily Summary AI Output
description: Structured JSON output expected from the AI daily summary prompt. Validated by module 08 before publishing.

headline.description: Concise, factual headline summarising the day for this topic. No sensationalism. HTML-free.

overview.description: 3–5 sentence narrative overview of the day's key developments. Factual, third-person. HTML-free.

key_events.description: Top 3–7 events of the day, ranked by importance.

significance.description: One to two sentences explaining why this event matters.

importance_score.description: Estimated importance to the topic audience (0–100).

source_url.description: URL of the source item. Null when not available.

source_role.description: Role of this source for this event, e.g. 'primary', 'data', 'confirmation', 'commentary'.

sources.description: Sources that support or substantiate this key event. Null or empty when source attribution is not available.

market_context.description: Optional macro or market context relevant to the day's events. Omit when not applicable.

sentiment.description: Overall sentiment for this topic on this day.

topic_score.description: Overall activity and significance score for this topic on this day (0=quiet, 100=extremely active).

source_url.description: URL of the source. Null when not available.

source_role.description: Role of this source in the summary, e.g. 'primary', 'data', 'confirmation', 'commentary'.

sources.description: Aggregated list of sources used across the entire daily summary. Null when source tracking is not available.

source_confidence_note.description: Brief note on overall source quality, diversity, and how it affects confidence in the summary. Null when not applicable.

examples.headline: Bitcoin Breaks $120K as Institutional Inflows Hit Record High
examples.overview: Bitcoin surged past $120,000 on Thursday, driven by record institutional inflows and strong ETF demand. The move extended a week-long rally and pushed total crypto market cap above $3 trillion for the first time. Major altcoins followed with gains of 5–15%. Sentiment remained broadly bullish as on-chain metrics showed continued accumulation by long-term holders.

key_events.title: Bitcoin New All-Time High Above $120K
key_events.significance: A new all-time high reinforces the ongoing bull market and is likely to attract additional retail and institutional flows.

key_events.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF Daily Inflow Exceeds $1.5B
key_events.significance: Record daily ETF inflows indicate sustained institutional demand and further legitimisation of Bitcoin as an asset class.

examples.market_context: US equities closed higher on the day, supporting broad risk appetite. The DXY softened slightly, providing additional tailwind for crypto assets.
examples.source_confidence_note: High confidence: summary draws from a mix of specialist outlets and real-time market data APIs, with institutional flow data confirmed by a wire service.
